summary.interpretation: Manual minimal Baseline B does not call any external model API. Each trial first makes a plausible but wrong raw GraphQL list guess, observes a GraphQL error, then recovers using a context-informed query. This keeps the eventual product data aligned with Baseline A and MCP, while preserving the initial raw GraphQL failure cost.

tools.description: Create a pending MiSArch order for a selected product variant. Controlled side effect: creates a shopping cart item and pending order only; does not place the order or trigger payment.

user_id.description: MiSArch user UUID owning the shopping cart and order

product_variant_id.description: MiSArch product variant UUID selected by the agent

quantity.description: number of items to reserve in the pending order; allowed range 1 to 3

shipment_method_id.description: MiSArch shipment method UUID to use for this order item

shipment_address_id.description: MiSArch user address UUID where the order should be shipped

invoice_address_id.description: MiSArch user address UUID used for invoicing

payment_information_id.description: MiSArch payment information UUID; payment is not triggered by this tool

coupon_ids.description: optional MiSArch coupon UUIDs to attach to the order item

tools.name: create_pending_order

tools.description: Get one public MiSArch catalog product by UUID. Read-only. No side effects.

product_id.description: MiSArch product UUID returned by list_products

tools.name: get_product

tools.description: List up to 10 public MiSArch catalog products. Read-only. No side effects.

top_k.description: maximum number of products to return; optional; default 5; allowed range 1 to 10

tools.name: list_products
